Occupational Profiles of Our Graduates

MENU

Our graduates are employed as "special education teachers" in general education and special education schools, special education and rehabilitation centers and guidance and research centers under the Ministry of National Education. In addition, by completing their graduate education, they can work as experts and academicians in the relevant field at various universities.
